RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/db2luw/crsp_read_dbtablename_cc_all.sql
RuleSet.GenFile: -- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ create or replace procedure $sp_read_dbtablename_cc_all$($implDb2LUWSPStandardArgs$ ) \\ dynamic result sets 1 \\ language sql \\ begin \\ declare permissionFlag integer; \\ declare isSystemUser integer; \\ declare syscurs cursor with return to client for \\ select distinct( $lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.ClassCode ) as ClassCode \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$ as $lower ClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implDb2LUWClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ \\ order by ClassCode asc; \\ declare usercurs cursor with return to client for \\ select distinct( $lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.ClassCode ) as ClassCode \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$ as $lower ClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implDb2LUWClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$$maybeRestrictReadSec$ \\ order by ClassCode asc; \\ begin$switch TableName Cluster empty Tenant empty SecUser empty SecSession empty default implDb2LUWSPReadEnforceSec$$implDb2LUWSPReadTableImplBody$ \\ end; \\ end
